metadata.source: Cross-reference of developers.beeper.com docs vs. Dev Community threads + GitHub repos

gaps.issue: The main page links to /desktop-api-reference/ but this URL returns 404. REST endpoints are only documented indirectly through SDK references and the API changelog.
gaps.impact: Developers who want raw REST docs (without SDK) have no single reference page.

gaps.issue: GET /v1/ws was added in v4.2.557 (Feb 13, 2026) per API changelog but there is no dedicated documentation page describing event types, subscription format, or payload schemas.
gaps.impact: Developers must reverse-engineer WebSocket event formats.

gaps.issue: The MCP documentation page focuses entirely on client setup. It does not list available MCP tools, their parameters, or capabilities.
gaps.impact: Developers must connect a client and discover tools at runtime.

gaps.issue: Translation feature exists in nightly builds for ~2 months (per batuhan, Mar 4, 2026) but has zero documentation or blog coverage.
gaps.impact: Users on nightly don't know the feature exists. No API docs for translation integration.

gaps.issue: Blog (Nov 2025) mentions experimental AI in chats. Community says 'AI Chats coming very soon' (Mar 2026). No developer docs exist.
gaps.impact: No programmatic access to AI features documented.

gaps.issue: batuhan says '3 bridges in AI bridge very close to ready for testing' (Mar 6, 2026). Code at github.com/beeper/agentremote. Zero docs on developers.beeper.com.
gaps.impact: AI Bridge is unknown to anyone not in the Matrix developer chat.

gaps.issue: Webhooks are the #1 community request (confirmed by batuhan Dec 2025). Still not available or documented. WebSocket events (v4.2.557) may be partial substitute.
gaps.impact: Real-time integrations (n8n, Zapier, CRM) require polling workarounds.

gaps.issue: batuhan confirmed working on 'headless/hostable Desktop API with decryption/webhooks' (Dec 2025). No docs, no timeline, no progress updates.
gaps.impact: Server/Docker deployments impossible without full desktop app running.

gaps.issue: App has send-later/scheduled messages. batuhan says 'we'll have API support for most features' (Feb 2026). No API endpoint exists yet.
Python SDK install requires SSH access to private GitHub repo. Not on PyPI. Higher barrier than TypeScript (npm) or Go (public module).
gaps.impact: New developers can't easily install the Python SDK.

gaps.issue: Desktop changelog at beeper.com/changelog/desktop uses dynamic loading. Only latest version renders on initial load. Older entries require JS execution.
gaps.impact: Cannot scrape/archive older changelog entries. Automated monitoring breaks.
